a.label: curvature order / signed blow-up order kappa_{D_a}(f)
a.standard_term: signed valuation (blow-up order) of a germ along a divisor component; weighted order for a weight w

b.label: E = F_0(u)(w_1,...,w_k)
b.standard_term: multiquadratic extension field generated by the k radicals w_i = sqrt(u+N_i^2)

evidence.label: Curvature order (blow-up order, weighted order)
evidence.summary:
For a scalar germ \(f\) along \(D_a\), write
\[
\operatorname{ord}_{D_a}(f)=\lambda
\]
when \(f=z_a^\lambda u\) with \(u|_{D_a}\neq0\). Define the signed blow-up order
\[
\kappa_{D_a}(f):=-\operatorname{ord}_{D_a}(f).
\]

evidence.label: General single-face curvature valuation
evidence.summary:
There are smooth germs \(F_0,\ldots,F_m\) such that
\[
R
=
x^{-(p_0+2)}F_0(x,y)
+
\sum_{\alpha=1}^{m}x^{-p_\alpha}F_\alpha(x,y),
\tag{5.1}
\]
with
\[
F_0(0,y)=\frac{C(p)}{h_0(0,y)}.
\tag{5.2}
\]
